48a65106-29f3-4bc9-98f8-0e57e96662d2.name: Meera Subramaniam
48a65106-29f3-4bc9-98f8-0e57e96662d2.chief_complaint: Persistent headache, fatigue, and intermittent dizziness for the past 3 weeks.
48a65106-29f3-4bc9-98f8-0e57e96662d2.symptoms: Headache – Bilateral, throbbing; severity 6/10; worsens in the afternoon and with screen exposure. Fatigue – Constant, not relieved by sleep; affecting daily productivity. Dizziness – Intermittent episodes (3–4/day); lasts ~2 minutes; positional component noted. Nausea – Mild, accompanying dizziness episodes; no vomiting. Blurred vision – Occasional, lasting seconds; right eye predominantly. Neck stiffness – Mild; present on waking; eases within an hour. Mild photophobia, occasional tinnitus.
